name: No-Bake Peanut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, milk, and syrup in a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until it reaches the soft ball stage (236°F) or until the syrup dropped into cold water forms a soft ball.
4. Remove from heat; add peanut butter and vanilla; stir until blended.
5. Stir in oats and peanuts.
6. Drop quickly by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.
7. Cool.
